_comment: Master question pool. Each run picks a random subset, solves them, then removes them and tops the pool back up from `replenish_pool`.

active_pool.title: Valid Parentheses
active_pool.prompt: Given a string s containing just the characters '(', ')', '{', '}', '[' and ']', determine if the input string is valid. Brackets must close in the correct order.

active_pool.title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
active_pool.prompt: Merge two sorted linked lists and return it as a sorted list.

active_pool.title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock
active_pool.prompt: Given an array prices where prices[i] is the price of a given stock on the i-th day, maximize profit by choosing a single day to buy and a different day in the future to sell.

active_pool.title: Group Anagrams
active_pool.prompt: Given an array of strings strs, group the anagrams together.

active_pool.title: Container With Most Water
active_pool.prompt: Given an integer array height of length n, find two lines that together with the x-axis form a container, such that the container contains the most water.

active_pool.title: 3Sum
active_pool.prompt: Given an integer array nums, return all the triplets [nums[i], nums[j], nums[k]] such that i, j, k are distinct and nums[i] + nums[j] + nums[k] == 0.

active_pool.title: Validate Binary Search Tree
active_pool.prompt: Given the root of a binary tree, determine if it is a valid binary search tree.

active_pool.title: Course Schedule
active_pool.prompt: There are numCourses you have to take, labeled from 0 to numCourses - 1. You are given an array prerequisites. Return true if you can finish all courses.

active_pool.title: LRU Cache
active_pool.prompt: Design a data structure that follows the constraints of a Least Recently Used (LRU) cache. Implement get and put in O(1).

active_pool.title: House Robber
active_pool.prompt: You are a professional robber planning to rob houses along a street. You cannot rob two adjacent houses. Given an integer array nums representing the amount of money of each house, return the maximum amount of money you can rob tonight.

active_pool.title: Kth Largest Element in an Array
active_pool.prompt: Given an integer array nums and an integer k, return the kth largest element in the array.

active_pool.title: Top K Frequent Elements
active_pool.prompt: Given an integer array nums and an integer k, return the k most frequent elements.

active_pool.title: Longest Palindromic Substring
active_pool.prompt: Given a string s, return the longest palindromic substring in s.

active_pool.title: Search in Rotated Sorted Array
active_pool.prompt: Given a rotated sorted array nums and an integer target, return the index of target if it is in nums, or -1.

active_pool.title: Unique Paths
active_pool.prompt: A robot is located at the top-left corner of a m x n grid. The robot can only move down or right. How many possible unique paths are there to reach the bottom-right corner?

active_pool.title: Min Stack
active_pool.prompt: Design a stack that supports push, pop, top, and retrieving the minimum element in constant time.

active_pool.title: Happy Number
active_pool.prompt: Write an algorithm to determine if a number n is happy. A happy number is defined by the process of replacing the number by the sum of the squares of its digits until it equals 1 or loops.

active_pool.title: Sliding Window Maximum
active_pool.prompt: Given an array nums and a sliding window of size k, return the max element in each window.

active_pool.title: Merge Intervals
active_pool.prompt: Given an array of intervals, merge all overlapping intervals.

active_pool.title: Insert Interval
active_pool.prompt: Insert a new interval into a list of non-overlapping intervals and merge if necessary.

active_pool.title: Pacific Atlantic Water Flow
active_pool.prompt: Given an m x n matrix of non-negative integers representing heights, return a list of grid coordinates where water can flow to both Pacific and Atlantic oceans.

active_pool.title: Subsets
active_pool.prompt: Given an integer array nums of unique elements, return all possible subsets.

active_pool.title: Permutations
active_pool.prompt: Given an array nums of distinct integers, return all the possible permutations.

active_pool.title: Combination Sum
active_pool.prompt: Given an array of distinct integers candidates and a target integer target, return a list of all unique combinations of candidates where the chosen numbers sum to target.

active_pool.title: Rotting Oranges
active_pool.prompt: Given an m x n grid where each cell can have one of three values, return the minimum number of minutes that must elapse until no cell has a fresh orange.

active_pool.title: Kth Smallest Element in a BST
active_pool.prompt: Given the root of a binary search tree, and an integer k, return the kth smallest value in the tree.

active_pool.title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
active_pool.prompt: Given the root of a binary tree, return its maximum depth.

active_pool.title: Diameter of Binary Tree
active_pool.prompt: Given the root of a binary tree, return the length of the diameter of the tree.

active_pool.title: Linked List Cycle
active_pool.prompt: Given head, the head of a linked list, determine if the linked list has a cycle in it.

active_pool.title: Reorder List
active_pool.prompt: You are given the head of a singly linked-list. Reorder the list to: L0 → Ln → L1 → Ln-1 → L2 → Ln-2 → …

replenish_pool.title: Valid Anagram
replenish_pool.prompt: Given two strings s and t, return true if t is an anagram of s.

replenish_pool.title: Encode and Decode Strings
replenish_pool.prompt: Design an algorithm to encode a list of strings to a single string. The encoded string is then sent over the network and is decoded back to the original list of strings.

replenish_pool.title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
replenish_pool.prompt: Given an unsorted array of integers nums, return the length of the longest consecutive elements sequence in O(n).

replenish_pool.title: Find Minimum in Rotated Sorted Array
replenish_pool.prompt: Given the sorted rotated array nums, return the minimum element of this array.

replenish_pool.title: Search a 2D Matrix
replenish_pool.prompt: You are given an m x n integer matrix with sorted rows and a target integer. Return true if target is in matrix.

replenish_pool.title: Decode Ways
replenish_pool.prompt: A message containing letters from A-Z can be encoded into numbers (A=1, ..., Z=26). Given a string s containing only digits, return the number of ways to decode it.

replenish_pool.title: Longest Increasing Subsequence
replenish_pool.prompt: Given an integer array nums, return the length of the longest strictly increasing subsequence.

replenish_pool.title: Partition Equal Subset Sum
replenish_pool.prompt: Given a non-empty array nums containing only positive integers, find if the array can be partitioned into two subsets such that the sum of elements in both subsets is equal.
